awesomeListMeta.description: A List of Awesome Swift Playgrounds

nodes.itemHTML: • 2022stars58
• Accessible Realitystars23 - for learning the basics of ARKit through interactive lessons. 🍁
• 2021stars167
• 2020stars206
• 2019stars282
• coreml-playgroundstars40 - Core ML examples for Swift Playgrounds. 🍁
• SF Symbols Viewerstars14 - An SF Symbols Viewer for Swift Playgrounds. 🍁
• jscore-playgroundstars17 - A JavaScript REPL using JavaScriptCore. 🍁
• Core Animation Timingstars1 - Playground demonstrating effects of CAMediaTiming properties. 🍁
• Image Filteringstars77 - A Swift playgroundbook about Image Filtering. 🍁🌟
• Neural Networkstars57 - A Swift PlaygroundBook about Neural Networks. 🍁
• Guilloche Pattern Playground Bookstars16 - Learn more about this pattern you see every day, but probably never knew it was really carefully designed. 🍁
• Accessibilitystars5 - Accessibility for iOS developers. 🍁
• TJBot Playgroundstars33 - Swift Playground for interacting with IBM's TJBot. 🍁
• What's new in Swift 4stars1.8k - An Xcode playground showing off the new features in Swift 4.0. 🍁 🌟
• What's new in Swift 4.2stars879 - An Xcode playground showing off the new features in Swift 4.2. 🍁 🌟
• Codable Playgroundstars16 - Playground that demonstrates advanced uses of Codable. 🍁
• Generics In Swift - Playground that explains generics. 🍁
• Swift String Cheat Sheetstars58 - A quick guide to using Strings with Swift. 🍁
• About Swiftstars73 - A playground about Swift language. 🍁
• The Principles of OOD in Swift 4stars1.8k - The Principles of OOD based on Uncle Bob articles.🍁
• Functional Debug Viewstars37 - Playground to visualize functional programming with graphical sequences. 🍁 🌟
• OOP with Functions in Swiftstars58 - Object-Oriented Programming in Functional Programming in Swift. 🍁
• Animated Sorting Algorithmsstars32 - Swift 4 playgrounds to view and manipulate sorting algorithms.🍁
• Expressionsstars398 - Arithmetic and logical expressions elegantly modeled and visualized using protocol-oriented binary trees.🍁
• Introduction to Compilersstars403 - Great introduction to the inner workings of compilers. 🍁🌟
• Pascal Interpreterstars277 - Simple Swift interpreter for the Pascal language inspired by the Let’s Build A Simple Interpreter article series. 🍁
• SceneKit ARKit Demostars47 - The Xcode 9 ARKit SpriteKit demo as a playground.🍁
• Guilloche Pattern Playground Bookstars16 - Learn more about this pattern you see every day, but probably never knew it was really carefully designed. 🍁
• Parks And Recreationstars170 - Great collection of interesting playgrounds, for fun and for profit. 🍁🌟
• URaimo's Playgroundsstars140 - My playgrounds, various topics. 🍁
• Rubik's Cubestars17 - Implementing basic model and behavior of Rubic's Cube in Swift. 🍁
• SwiftChain - Simple Cryptocurrency in a Swift Playground.
• 2018stars267
• 2017stars244
• 2016stars82
• 2015stars130
• 2014stars186
• Milesstars30 - A Swift Playground that creates jazz improvisations in any key using AudioToolbox and AVFoundation.
• AudioKit Playgrounds - 130+ Audio synthesis, processing, playback, and analysis playgrounds with AudioKit.
• AudioKit Playground Bookstars186 - A set of playgrounds using AudioKit designed for the iPad Playgrounds app.
• Abstract Algebrastars190 - Abstract algebra concepts implemented in Swift.
• GOF Swiftstars118 - Learn all 23 Gang of Four patterns using Swift.
• SpriteKit Collisionsstars32 - Demonstrates how to perform physics collision detection using Swift and SpriteKit. ⏳
• Emoji Intelligencestars1.3k - Neural Network built in Apple Playground using Swift. 🌟
• Spacetime Rhapsodystars22 - A Swift Playground visualizing gravity based on Einstein's Theory of General Relativity. 🌟
• Astronomystars24 - A 3D earth model written in swift playground using SceneKit.
• Tree Trouble Playbookstars22 - An interactive Swift Playground Book about Binary Search Trees.
• Auto Pongstars12 - A tutorial to implement a pong based on a simple AI.
• Neural Network Playgroundstars378 - A neural network Swift playground, with no third party dependencies.
• Window Manager Playgroundstars40 - Playground for an experimental window manager.
• Numswstars132 - A swift playground book that mimics some of the features of numpy and jupyter notebook.
• File Browser Playgroundstars203 - Simple File Browser for Swift Playgrounds on iOS.
• Geometry with Swiftstars8 - In this course your students will learn the fundamentals of Swift 3 programming, using geometry as their context for learning.
• A Starstars33 - Protocol oriented A* pathfinding algorithm implementation in Swift 4.🍁
• Apple's Balloons Playground - The balloons playground showed at WWDC14. ⏳
• Duet-Inspired Trail Effectstars25 - How to get a Duet style trailing effect in SpriteKit.
• Swift Regular Expressionsstars10 - A playground to learn regular expressions with Swift.
• Network Stackstars34 - Clean & simple Swift networking stack playground.
• Interactive Newton's Cradle - Apple's interactive playground of a Newton's Cradle where collisions and gravity are applyed with UIKit dynamics. 🌟 (updated to Swift 3 by @p-sun)
• Metalbrotstars82 - Interactive playground that draws the Mandelbrot fractal with Metal. 🌟
• Let's build a compiler in Swiftstars160 - Let's Build a Compiler by Jack Crenshaw translated to Swift Playgrounds. 🌟
• Mgrebenets's Playgroundsstars9 - Various playgrounds.c 🌟
• Cocoa With Love Playgroundsstars89 - Playground versions of select articles from Cocoa with Love. 🌟
• Pixel Art Makerstars94 - A playground where you can make pixel art.
• SwiftCoinstars32 - A simplistic blockchain & cryptocurrency in a playground.
• SentimentlySwiftstars12 - Sentiment analysis in Swift.
• The Swift Programming Language Playgroundsstars218 - 40+ playgrounds, one for each chapter of Apple's Swift book. 🌟
• Swift Hack Packstars20 - Collection of playgrounds that teaches Swift.
• The Swift Summary Bookstars1.7k - A summary of Apple's Swift language. 🌟
• Swifter Tipsstars126 - Examples for every feature of the Swift language.
• MPCS51032 UChicago iOS Coursestars7 - Playgrounds from the 2017 Spring iOS course of the University of Chicago.
• A Swift Introduction to Core Datastars149 - Learn Core Data experimenting directly in this playground. 🌟
• TDDSwiftPlaygroundstars53 - Demonstration of using Swift Playgrounds in Test Driven Development with XCTest.
• Concurrency on iOSstars33 - Concurrency and Parallelism in iOS.
• Modern Core Datastars35 - An introduction to Core Data.
• Swift DSL Examplestars19 - Implementation of a DSL in Swift.
• Katanstars25 - A micro web server that replies "Hello world!" to every request, an example of how to use sockets in Swift.
• Swiftly Typed Resourcesstars73 - A playground showing how Swift makes Strings, Colors, Fonts, Images, etc easier to deal with. ⏳
• Swift KVO Closuresstars11 - Swift KVO playground. ⏳
• Swift Date Tutorialstars7 - Learn everythig about NSDate. ⏳
• Swift And Cstars6 - Examples about using C with Swift. ⏳
• Swift Memory Managementstars3 - How to avoid retain cycles, from this post. ⏳
• Design Patterns Playgroundstars26 - Learning GoF's Design Patterns in Swift 3.
• iOS Design Patternsstars128 - Sample projects for MVC, MVP, MVVM, and VIPER.
• Design Patterns in Swiftstars13.8k - Design patterns in Swift 3.
• Swift Diagram Playgroundsstars268 - Adaptation of the Protocol-Oriented Programming in Swift talk from WWDC 2015.
• Swift Protocol Extensionsstars20 - A playground to explore Protocol Extensions. ⏳
• Battleship Examplestars12 - An example of how to use Protocol Oriented Programming with the battleship game. ⏳
• ReactiveCocoa Playgroundstars97 - The easiest way to get a taste of ReactiveCocoa. ⏳
• Swift Reactive Playgroundstars27 - Companion to the article: ReactiveCocoa made Simple With Swift. ⏳
• Apple's Mandelbrot Playgroundstars22 - A playground with the mandelbrot fractal (updated to Swift 3 by @palmerc, @kemalenver).
• Apple's Crustacean Playground - Protocol-Oriented Programming with Value Types. ⏳
• Apple's Swift Standard Library Playground - experiment with Swift standard library types and high-level concepts using visualizations and practical examples. ⏳
• XCTest Playgroundstars52 - Better looking tests for playgrounds.
• Interactive Playgroundstars52 - Exploring interactivity in Playgrounds.
• Mondrianstars3 - Make iOS app mockups in Swift 2.x playgrounds. ⏳
• iPad Swift Playgroundsstars23 - The sample playgroundbooks converted to playgrounds.
• Logicianstars191 - Logic programming in Swift. 🌟
• Function Composition in Swiftstars58 - Exploration of function composition in Swift. 🌟
• Swift Adventures in Monad Landstars170 - Learn about monads.
• Functional Design Patternsstars5 - A few functional programming concept and patterns.
• Learn about transducersstars79 - A little tutorial that explains transducers. ⏳
• Swift Functors, Applicatives, and Monads in Picturesstars67 - Companion to the article: Swift Functors, Applicatves, and Monads in Pictures. ⏳
• Functors in Swiftstars6 - A playground to introduce Functors in Swift, and their practical usage. ⏳
• Swift Algorithm Clubstars27k - Algorithms and data structures in Swift with explanations. 🌟
• Sorting Experimentsstars5 - Alluring experiments with sorting algorithms in Swift, sort of.
• Visual Binary Treesstars57 - Effortless visualization of arbitrary Binary Trees, along with their pluggable traversal implementations. 🌟
• Julia Fractal Playgroundstars254 - A Swift playground that generates beautiful Julia set fractal images.
• DataStructures Playgroundstars15 - Data Structures and Algorithms in Swift. ⏳
• Swiftographystars8 - Standard cryptographic algorithms in a Swift Playground. ⏳
• Algorithms Playgroundstars5 - Various algorithm implementation in Swift. ⏳
• The Jelly Bean Problemstars2 - The Jelly Bean problem from Wait But Why. ⏳
• Euclidean Stringsstars1 - A playground leveraging ReSwift to generate Euclidean Strings. ⏳
• Write your own language: Mustars1.1k - A playground explaining how to create a tiny programming language named Mu. 🌟
• ASM Swiftstars101 - A playground for learning Assembly language through Swift. 🌟
• Register VMstars5 - A register-based VM in a Swift playground. 🌟 ⏳
• Turtle Playgroundstars127 - A playground with Logo-like commands. 🌟 ⏳
• Swift Brainfuckstars8 - Brainfuck interpreter written in Swift using Playground. ⏳
• UIStackView Playgroundstars324 - Interesting examples of use of UIStackViews.🌟
• Bezier Path Playgroundsstars26 - Some playgrounds to better understand UIBezierPaths.
• UIKit playgroundstars43 - Playgrounds to experiment interactively with UIKit views.
• UIDynamic Playgroundstars4 - Multiple Playgrounds using almost every behaviour of UIDynamic.
• WWDC16 Typographystars7 🇯🇵 - Draw a logo or any text with the WWDC16 ASCII texture.
• Animated GIF Playgroundstars1 - Swift playground for generating animated GIFs.
• RPClaritystars41 - Shows a technique for blurring an image behind the characters behind one or more UILabels. ⏳
• Swift Clockstars28 - An animated clock in a swift playground. ⏳
• WatchKit Asset Playgroundstars8 - A swift playground for creating awesome animations for your WatchKit Apps. ⏳
• Swift 2.0 Protocol Extension Examplestars38 - Showing how to use Swift2 protocol extensions to render errors in UIViews and UIViewControllers without subclassing or creating classes. ⏳
• Tintingstars0 - A small playground to demonstrate image tinting in UIKit. ⏳
• Ray tracing Playgroundstars16 - A playground and a series of articles on ray tracing, see also part 2stars6, 3stars7, 4stars3, 5stars5 🌟 ⏳
• WWDC16 Logo Playground - Drawing the WWDC16 logo in a playground. ⏳
• Interpolation Playgroundstars61 - Playground demonstrating lerp, smooth step, Catcall-Rom and others! ⏳
• CoreImage for Swift Playgroundsstars86 - Growing collection of CoreImage playgrounds from the upcoming book "CoreImage For Swift". 🌟 ⏳
• Image Processorstars8 - Implementing different image filter algorithms. ⏳
• METAL Playgroundstars52 - Apple Metal framework playground. 🌟 ⏳
• Core Animation Swift Playgroundsstars34 - A set of interesting Core Animation playgounds.
• UIViewPropertyAnimator Playgroundstars37 - Playground demonstrating UIViewPropertyAnimator.
• WWDC Crowd Simulator 2017stars33 - A SpriteKit experiment to simulate the WWDC2017 logo crowd.
• Additive Animationsstars34 - Experiment with multiple additive animations in Core Animation. ⏳
• Core Animation Playgroundstars9 - Companion to Apple's Core Animation Programming Guide. ⏳
• SpriteKit Swift 3stars7 - Playground for exploring Sprite Kit.
• SceneKit Examplesstars19 - Experiment with SceneKit and Swift. ⏳
• Bach Playgroundstars3 - A Simple Swift Playground that plays a brief piece by Bach with AVAudioEngine and AVMIDIPlayer.
• PlayerNode Playgroundstars3 - Playground using AVAudioEngine with a playernode and effects to play an audio file. 🌟
• Lindenmayer Systemsstars11 - A Swift playground exploring Lindemayer systems.
• Swift Natural Numbersstars3 - A playground for implementing the natural numbers and more concepts in number theory.
• Polydoxicalstars0 - Interactive playground to experiment with roulettes and polygons.
• Swift Acceleratestars111 - Using the Accelerate framework and Swift for Linear Algebra. ⏳
• Swifty Mathematicsstars3 - A collection of swift playground about mathematics. ⏳
• Numerical Algorithms - Numerical argorithms playground from Ray Wenderlich. ⏳
• AIToolbox - A set of playgrounds showing machine learning algorithms, all implemented with pieces of the AIToolbox framework code.
• Cognitive Service APIsstars56 - Get started with the Microsoft Cognitive Services APIs.
• Rx Playgroundstars6 - A playground with RxSwift examples.
• Public Extensionsstars299 - A set of useful extensions from @PublicExtension. 🌟
• ManuelCarlos's Playgrouds - Various playgrounds.
• Sketchytech's Playgroundsstars7 - Various Playgrounds. 🌟 ⏳
• Swift fun playgroundsstars8 - A few playgrounds to showcase Swift peculiar features. ⏳
• BradLarson's Playgroundsstars20 - Various playgrounds. ⏳
• Dmikusa's Playgroundsstars15 - Playgrounds that show basic Swift, JSON parsing, sending HTTP requests and basic file IO. ⏳
• Cananito's Playgroundsstars1 - Various playgrounds. ⏳
• Uberbruns's Playgroundsstars4 - Various playgrounds. ⏳
• Icon Creatorstars37 - Create app icons on Swift playground.
• 2048 Playgroundstars40 - The 2048 game implemented with a playground.
• SwiftShellstars19 - Bash shell in a playground.
• LaunchPad Playgroundstars5 - A playground that simulates a real LaunchPad for making music.
• Super Mazestars8 - A programmatic maze generator and solver.
• Tic Tac Toestars7 - Tic tac toe in a playground.
• Game Boardsstars179 - Chess, checkers, tic-tac-toe, sudoku and many others in playground. 🌟 ⏳
• StarWars Sealsstars3 - Emblems from Star Wars in Swift playgrounds via CoreGraphics and UIViews. ⏳
• SwiftFilesstars39 - Save, Load and Delete files easily from within a Swift playground. ⏳
• Earth photosstars6 - A slideshow of Earth photos taken by DSCOVR/EPIC. 🌟 ⏳
